visual_summary: A massive, high-ceilinged marble hall within the Grand Zodangan palace. The architecture is opulent, designed to showcase wealth and power through scale and brilliant illumination. Key features include a central ceremonial dais, a throne for the Jeddak, and high windows (one of which is noted as shattered).
layout_notes: Massive scale with high-ceilinged marble architecture; contains a central ceremonial dais and a throne/seat of power.
lighting: Brilliantly illuminated; high-key lighting intended to showcase wealth and power.
mood: Shifts from ceremonial splendor to chaotic combat characterized by dust and smoke.
recurring_elements: Throne/seat of power for the Jeddak
constraints: Lighting must transition from high-key splendor to combat-driven chaos (dust/smoke)
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural details of the marble structure beyond "high-ceilinged" are unstated.
Exact placement or design of the golden ceremonial chains is not specified.
